strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience spanning TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple senior roles
Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly matching the AI agent development requirement
Strong engineering practices background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development from RIDE Capital
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, the listed primary backend framework
Limited evidence of Kotlin experience; Java mentioned only briefly for robotic arms and mobile orchestration years ago
No PostgreSQL experience listed — database exposure is primarily MongoDB and MySQL

key_factors.factor: AI agent / MCP experience at re:cinq

response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 6+ years bar with a decade of full-stack work and recent hands-on TypeScript/Node.js plus React at Optilyz and re:cinq, directly matching the primary stack. The re:cinq role explicitly covers AI-agent infrastructure and MCP generators, satisfying the AI agent development requirement which is often a gap. Engineering rigor is well-evidenced (TDD/CI/CD at RIDE, workshops on testing, open-source test tooling like Trial and Fluent-Asserts). Gaps: Nest.js is not named, Kotlin is absent, and PostgreSQL is not listed — though MongoDB and MySQL are. Cloud (AWS CDK at Optilyz), Docker, and Kubernetes (GISCollective) are covered. Overall a strong fit with framework-specific ramp-up needed.
